scripts.deploy: tsc && node dist/manifest-gen.js && node view/build.js && mkdir -p ../TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-gallery-dl && cp dist/index.js dist/sites.js dist/settings.js manifest.json ../TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-gallery-dl/ && mkdir -p ../TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-gallery-dl/view && cp view/index.js ../TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-gallery-dl/view/
scripts.package: tsc && node dist/manifest-gen.js && node view/build.js && mkdir -p dist/package && cp dist/index.js dist/sites.js dist/settings.js manifest.json dist/package/ && mkdir -p dist/package/view && cp view/index.js dist/package/view/ && cd dist/package && zip -r ../plugin-gallery-dl.zip .
